title: AI Sidebar Catches The Moment
hook: The sidebar turns a live podcast claim into a ready-to-render social clip.
transcriptQuote: One guest claims a new AI audio model can fact-check a podcast in real time while the producer asks for a quick joke about startup demo days.
reason: High-signal clip: clear claim, useful AI action, and a visual sidebar payoff.
captionBeats: A guest makes a bold AI claim.
The sidebar catches the useful moment.
A render bot can cut the clip.
